title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tama, Usopp, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Beast Pirates as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not going to start making excuses now, are you, jinbe?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We went into this battle knowing it would be our 5,000 against your 30,000. It's only natural you would exploit that,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I never expected this to be a one-on-one duel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha. You realize you've dug yourself into a hole? You really are a pain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! It's our job to deal with you officers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's no end to these grunts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You can't hold this against me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pleasures and waiters on the live floor have betrayed us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think?! We're gonna make an example out of them! Beat them till they can't walk!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Everyone who ate my kibi Dango...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She's still making a racket up there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is that brat's deal? Knock her off the ledge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Bro Luffy and His friends, momonosuke- Sun and his retailers...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 40 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
